extension.description: Store AI conversations as plain .filechat.json files you can version, branch, and review in VS Code.

configuration.title: One File Chat
configuration.sessions.scanConcurrency.d: Normal concurrency for reading `.filechat.json` files while loading a session directory.
configuration.sessions.cautiousScanConcu: Cautious concurrency for reading `.filechat.json` files after a slow or unstable file system is detected. The effective value will not exceed the normal concurrency.
Automatically lower or restore session scan concurrency based on scan duration and file system errors.
